creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
Change all appropriate ports which have "kmod" in the directory name or mention SRC_BASE to USES=kmod

This saves code duplication and makes sure the affected ports are correct.

Fix: 

patch at ftp://rene-ladan.nl/pub/freebsd/uses-kmod-r332637.diff

SHA256 = 2fee0903b324da1cecbb624bad897e3266977853e745ec2ef39b15e5c852ff13
How-To-Repeat: N/A
